description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, windows-2022, macOS-13) and Python versions (3.6 to 3.11). For each combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies, run tests and linting with various tools like pytest, vulture, bandit, and pydocstyle, and upload coverage to Codecov for specific configurations.
